      "操作工具：仅限于使用提供的RSS API工具进行文章获取、筛选和发布。",

}

jaghun_allocations.title: Feed Discovery - AI Category
jaghun_allocations.description: Identify and list all RSS feeds categorized under 'AI' or similar relevant categories for the AI team.

jaghun_allocations.title: Feed Discovery - General Tech Category
jaghun_allocations.description: Identify and list all RSS feeds categorized under 'Technology' or similar general tech categories.

jaghun_allocations.title: Feed Prioritization & Selection
jaghun_allocations.description: Review all discovered feeds, filter out irrelevant ones, and prioritize the top 5-7 most authoritative/relevant feeds for AI content.

jaghun_allocations.title: Article Collection - Batch 1
jaghun_allocations.description: List recent articles (e.g., max_results=10) from the first 2-3 prioritized feeds.

jaghun_allocations.title: Article Collection - Batch 2
jaghun_allocations.description: List recent articles (e.g., max_results=10) from the next 2-3 prioritized feeds.

jaghun_allocations.title: Article Collection - Batch 3
jaghun_allocations.description: List recent articles (e.g., max_results=10) from the remaining prioritized feeds.

jaghun_allocations.title: Initial Article Review & Shortlisting
jaghun_allocations.description: Review all collected articles for relevance to the AI team and create a shortlist of top candidates.

jaghun_allocations.title: Full Content Retrieval - Part 1
jaghun_allocations.description: Retrieve the full content for the first half of the shortlisted relevant articles.

jaghun_allocations.title: Full Content Retrieval - Part 2
jaghun_allocations.description: Retrieve the full content for the second half of the shortlisted relevant articles.

jaghun_allocations.title: Newsletter Draft Assembly
jaghun_allocations.description: Assemble the full newsletter content, including title and summary, based on the retrieved article contents, ready for publication.
